violations.text: No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (lemonade) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
Single service items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. At time of inspection, no sanitizer was available. Per interview with PIC, service is coming on 3/3. PIC to send inspector proof. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
Establishment is lacking a refuse/dumpster. Per interview with PIC, delivery will be taking place this week. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
Inspector observed missing ceiling tile in dry storage area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

The floor and wall junctures in the front kitchen does not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
